news.summary: Allied Energy Corporation is making progress in enhancing gas supply infrastructure to assist their Bitcoin mining partner at the Thiel site. This initiative involves significant investment to ensure ample supply for the mining operations, with the company aiming to increase gas supply by 20% within the next six months. This development is a strategic move to support the growing demand for Bitcoin mining and underscores Allied Energy Corporation's commitment to facilitating its partner's operations at the Thiel site.
news.headline: Allied Energy Corp improves gas infrastructure at Thiel site to back Bitcoin mining, aiding partner.

news.summary: Intapp, Inc., a prominent global provider of AI-driven solutions for professionals in advisory, capital markets, and legal sectors, disclosed on May 8, 2025, that its senior management is scheduled to participate and deliver a presentation at an upcoming investor conference. The company trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol INTA.
news.headline: Intapp (NASDAQ: INTA) will present at investor conference, providing AI solutions for advisory, capital markets, and legal firms.

news.summary: In the first quarter of both 2025 and 2024, total revenues remained stable at around $2.6 million. This figure did not show any significant change when comparing the revenues of the two three-month periods.
news.headline: LiveWorld's Q1 2025 revenues remain unchanged at $2.6 million when compared to Q1 2024.

news.summary: Hauppauge, New York - On May 8, 2025, United-Guardian, Inc. (NASDAQ:UG) released its financial data for the first quarter of 2025. Sales for the quarter dropped from $3,254,944 in 2024 to $2,481,127 in 2025, representing a decrease in net income from $925,442 ($0.20 per share) to $560,895 ($0.12 per share).
news.headline: United-Guardian's Q1 2025 sales drop to $2.48M from $3.25M in 2024; net income decreases to $560,895 from $925,442.

news.summary: Belvidere, New Jersey, May 08, 2025 - Edible Garden AG Incorporated, a prominent player in controlled environment agriculture, revealed plans to conduct a conference call on May 15, 2025, at 8:00 AM ET. The purpose of this call is to review financial performance for the 2025 first quarter and offer insights into the company's operations. Edible Garden is known for its emphasis on locally grown, organic, and sustainable produce and products. The call will be open to discuss their performance with stakeholders and interested individuals. The Company trades under the tickers Nasdaq: EDBL and EDBLW.
news.headline: Edible Garden to discuss Q1 2025 financial results and business update in conference call on May 15 at 8:00 AM ET.

news.summary: Results from a survey conducted during Fiverr Small Business Month revealed that marketing is considered a crucial factor for growth by small business owners. However, a notable 70% of these owners dedicate less than five hours per week to marketing efforts. This statistic indicates a potential gap between the perceived importance of marketing and the time actually allocated to this essential business function among small business owners.
news.headline: Fiverr survey shows 70% small business owners spend less than 5 hours a week on marketing, despite its importance.

news.summary: Micropolis Holding Co. (NYSE: MCRP) introduced customized versions of its M1 and M2 robotic mobility platforms for border control at the Airport Show 2025 in Dubai. The innovative unmanned ground vehicles cater to enhancing security with AI technology. The unveiling took place during the event held on May 6-8 in Dubai, where the UAE National Guard was introduced to these autonomous vehicles. This launch is part of a pilot program focused on bolstering national border protection strategies.
news.headline: Micropolis introduces border control robots at Airport Show 2025 in Dubai, showcasing M1 and M2 platforms, part of a pilot initiative with UAE National Guard. #advancedtech #airportsecurity

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. Unemployment rate also dropped to 4%, the lowest in a decade. The stock market saw a record increase of 500 points, reaching an all-time high. Additionally, exports rose by 10%, boosting the country's trade balance. Experts believe these positive indicators signal a strong economic recovery.
news.headline: IROs efficiently manage investor demands amidst time constraints to ensure maximum productivity.

news.summary: HeartSciences Inc., a medical technology company listed on Nasdaq as HSCS, based in Southlake, Texas, will be conducting a live investor webinar on May 14, 2025. The company specializes in AI-powered transformation of ECGs/EKGs for early detection of heart disease. The webinar, scheduled for 2:00 p.m. EDT | 11:00 a.m. PDT, will include a presentation and Q&A session with CEO Andrew Simpson. This is an opportunity for investors to learn more about the company's innovative approach towards saving lives through advanced medical technologies.
news.headline: HeartSciences to host investor webinar on May 14, 2025 at 2:00 p.m. EDT featuring CEO Andrew Simpson.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, which is a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the stock market has seen a notable increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. This positive trend is expected to continue in the coming months, as the economy shows signs of recovery following the challenges posed by the global pandemic. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and predict further growth in various sectors. Furthermore, the housing market has also experienced a surge, with a 10% increase in home sales compared to last year. Overall, the current economic indicators paint a promising picture for the nation's financial stability and growth potential.
news.headline: Rapala VMC Corporation announces decisions from Annual General Meeting and Board of Directors Organising Meeting.

news.summary: A new OsteoStrong location is set to open in Edina, Minnesota, providing residents with an advanced, non-pharmaceutical skeletal strengthening technology. OsteoStrong, a renowned company in the field of skeletal strength conditioning, is introducing this science-backed solution to help individuals enhance their bone health. This expansion reflects the growing interest in innovative approaches to improving overall wellness. The facility in Edina aims to cater to the increasing demand for such services in the Midwest region. This development signifies an important step in addressing bone-related concerns in the area and represents an opportunity for individuals to benefit from cutting-edge advancements in this field. The introduction of this technology to the Midwest highlights the commitment to promoting healthier living and offering effective solutions to residents.
news.headline: OsteoStrong opens new location in Edina, Minnesota, bringing skeletal strengthening technology to midwest.

news.summary: Leica Camera AG introduces the latest addition to the M11 series, the Leica M11-P Safari, marking a new milestone in the olive-green special edition's success. Released in TEANECK, N.J., on May 8, 2025, this model continues the legacy of the renowned M11 family. This release demonstrates the company's commitment to innovation and excellence, further solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Leica launches M11-P Safari, an olive-green special edition of M11 family, continuing its success story.

news.summary: A company based in Boulder, Colorado, called Radia has introduced a revolutionary oversized cargo aircraft named the WindRunner™. On May 8, 2025, they disclosed a Cooperative Research and Development Agreement (CRADA) with the U.S. Department of Defense. The aircraft measures an impressive 356 feet in length, aiming to handle large cargo volumes efficiently.
news.headline: Radia partners with U.S. DoD to test WindRunner™ for civil-military cargo ops. Aircraft is 356 feet long.

news.summary: A recent study by Net Health revealed that 63% of rehabilitation therapy professionals under the age of 35 are still grappling with the issue of burnout. Despite this, the majority believe that the integration of advanced technology solutions will be instrumental in addressing this challenge. The data emphasizes the pressing need for innovative strategies within the industry.
news.headline: 63% of rehab therapy professionals under 35 cite burnout as a challenge. Most believe in using advanced technology to combat it.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on May 8, 2025, Oracle Health Information Network Inc., a subsidiary of Oracle Health, has been selected as a candidate Qualified Health Information Network® (QHIN™) under the Trusted Exchange Framework and Common Agreement™ (TEFCA™). This milestone signifies that Oracle Health Information Network Inc. is now one of the potential entities involved in facilitating health information exchange in compliance with TEFCA™ guidelines.
news.headline: Oracle Health Information Network Inc. achieves candidate status for TEFCA QHIN as part of Trusted Exchange Framework, Common Agreement.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market report from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can gain key market insights before trading commences by checking out today's NYSE Pre-market update. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on this date, covering important figures and trends in the market.
news.headline: NYSE Pre-Market update and Aspen Insurance to debut on NYSE. Kristen Scholer provides updates on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: USANA continues to prioritize people, planet, and products, reaffirming its commitment on May 8, 2025, in Salt Lake City. Renowned as a leader in health and wellness, USANA strives to contribute to a healthier world. Emphasizing ethical business approaches, the company aims to support sustainable practices and impact the community positively.
news.headline: USANA releases 2024 Sustainability Report, emphasizing commitment to people, planet, and products in creating a healthier world.

news.summary: In Perth, Australia, on May 8, 2025, Laurence Escalante, the founder of VGW and a prominent supporter of emerging sectors, has spearheaded a crucial bridge financing round for Green Li-ion, an Australian company revolutionizing the battery recycling field. This funding round will provide significant support for the company's initiatives.
news.headline: Escalante backs battery recycling start-up Green Li-ion in Australia with strategic bridge funding.

news.summary: Starting May 8, 2025, the popular hairbrush can be purchased by Ulta Beauty customers both in stores and online. FHI Heat®, a reputable brand specializing in hair tools and care products, has introduced its top-rated UNbrush hairbrush. This launch includes an exclusive offer for Ulta Beauty shoppers to access the award-winning hairbrush with its acclaimed excellence, precision, and quality.
news.headline: FHI Heat UNbrush now at Ulta Beauty - available in stores and online. Launch announced on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Two exceptional Momentum Life Sciences Clinical Nurse Educators were recognized with the Impact Patient Engagement Award during the National Nurses Week celebration in Indianapolis on May 8, 2025. The award, presented by Momentum Life Sciences (formerly VMS BioMarketing), highlights the exemplary work of these individuals in engaging patients. The event showcased their commitment to patient care and education, demonstrating the importance of their role in the healthcare sector. This recognition emphasizes the dedication of these nurses and serves as a testament to their outstanding contributions to the field.
news.headline: Momentum Life Sciences names Nurse of the Year during National Nurses Week celebration, honoring two outstanding clinical nurse educators.

news.summary: Sweat, a move-to-earn platform, has introduced a new AI agent named Mia to enhance user onboarding and asset management across various blockchains. Mia, powered by Near.AI, assists users in handling their crypto rewards within the Sweat wallet. The platform now supports Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, and BNB Chain, enabling users to bridge assets and swap native tokens while paying gas fees in SWEAT tokens. Sweat, with 20 million users and 19 million tokenholders, rewards users for physical activity and allows them to exchange rewards for products or currency. Privacy and security measures are a priority, ensuring GDPR compliance and user sovereignty. The AI-driven Mia personalizes in-app recommendations and safeguards against AI-driven phishing attacks. The move-to-earn model is expanding, integrating AI to improve user experience and decentralized finance functionality.
news.headline: Sweat wallet integrates AI assistant Mia, expands to multichain DeFi with 20M users and 19M tokenholders. Crosschain capabilities added.

news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: Red Cat will report Q1 2025 earnings on May 14, 2025, with a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Planet Fitness Inc (NYSE: PLNT) saw a decrease in premarket trading after releasing first-quarter 2025 results. The gym franchise generated $276.7 million in sales, marking an 11.5% increase compared to the previous year, falling short of the estimated $279.16 million. Within the different segments, franchise revenue grew by 10.7%, corporate-owned stores by 9.2%, and the equipment segment soared by 28.7%. System-wide same club sales rose by 6.1% Y/Y to $1.3 billion compared to $1.2 billion in the previous year. The company ended Q1 with 20.6 million members, an increase of about 900,000 from 2024. The adjusted earnings per share stood at 59 cents, missing the consensus of 62 cents. Operating expenses also rose, reaching $197.5 million.
news.headline: Planet Fitness missed revenue expectations in Q1 2025, with sales up 11.5% to $276.7M. System-wide same club sales rose 6.1%.EPS was 59 cents vs 62 cents consensus. Members increased to 20.6M from 19.7M in 2024.

news.summary: The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings report on Thursday, May 8, after the market closes. Analysts are predicting the Ventura, California-based company to post earnings of 25 cents per share for the quarter, slightly below the 26 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Trade Desk is expected to disclose quarterly revenue of $575.28 million, showing an increase from the $491.25 million recorded a year ago according to data from Benzinga Pro. Shares of Trade Desk closed at $56.46 on Wednesday, marking a 1.5% increase. For more details and accurate analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.
news.headline: Wall Street analysts expect The Trade Desk (NASDAQ: TTD) to report Q1 earnings of 25 cents/share, down from 26 cents last year, with projected revenue of $575.28 million, up from $491.25 million. Shares rose 1.5% to $56.46.

news.summary: McKesson Corporation is set to announce its Q4 financial results soon, with analysts forecasting earnings at $9.83 per share, a significant increase from last year's $6.18 per share. The company is expected to post quarterly revenue of $94.2 billion, up from $76.36 billion in the previous year. BofA Securities analyst, Michael Cherny, has reiterated a Buy rating on McKesson with a revised price target of $755, up from $665. Investors are also looking at the company's dividend potential, with McKesson currently offering an annual dividend yield of 0.39%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 71 cents per share ($2.84 annually). For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: McKesson to release Q4 results, expecting $9.83/share earnings (up from $6.18) and $94.2 billion revenue (up from $76.36 billion).

news.summary: In Owens Cross Roads, Alabama, Alquist utilized 3D printing technology to construct a Walmart expansion in just 75 hours. This remarkable feat resulted in a 50% reduction in construction time compared to traditional methods. Additionally, the 3D-printed walls are three times stronger, showcasing the efficiency and durability of this innovative approach.
news.headline: Walmart's Alabama Supercenter gets 3D printed expansion by Alquist in 75 hours, 50% faster, with 3x stronger walls.

news.summary: In Ocala, Florida, on May 1, 2025, the Love Israel Foundation USA revealed a reinvigorated alliance with longtime partner Holy Spirit Tel Aviv (previously Love Israel Tel Aviv). This partnership aims to bolster a significant endeavor: the establishment and growth of the Prayer initiative.
news.headline: Love Israel Foundation USA teams up with Holy Spirit Tel Aviv to aid Prayer Garden Project in Israel. Great news for supporters!

news.summary: In Los Angeles on May 8, 2025, Sidecar Health, a leading consumer-driven health insurance provider, revealed an update to its member services by incorporating clinical quality scores. This move reinforces their dedication to empowering members with comprehensive information about healthcare providers. The company continues to prioritize enhancing the experience for its members by ensuring access to high-quality care.
news.headline: Sidecar Health adds clinical quality scores to empower members with transparent information, enhancing member experience.

news.summary: A recent announcement from Design Power, Inc. based in San Jose, California, highlighted their new innovation - the Design++® Warehouse Configurator demonstration for Tekla Structures. This advancement is designed to streamline warehouse processes through automation. Design Power, Inc., known for their expertise in engineering design automation, showcased the capabilities of this new tool on May 8, 2025. The demo provides users with the ability to automate warehouse operations, signifying a significant step forward in enhancing efficiency. This development can potentially revolutionize the way warehouses function, bringing ease and modernization to the industry. For more information, individuals can visit the company's website at www.designpower.com.
news.headline: Design Power unveils Design++® Warehouse Configurator for Tekla Structures, automating warehouse design.

news.summary: In Claremont, California on May 8, 2025, LMA Consulting Group, Inc., a top expert in manufacturing supply chain strategy and transformation spearheaded by Lisa Anderson, MBA, CSCP, CLTD, President, has rolled out a fresh services framework. This innovative framework is designed to enhance manufacturers' comprehension of industry dynamics and improve their operational efficiency.
news.headline: Manufacturing expert Lisa Anderson introduces new services framework to clarify supply chain priorities for manufacturers.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, ExlService Holdings, Inc. revealed that Maurizio Nicolelli, the CFO, and John Kristoff, head of investor relations, will be attending upcoming investor conferences. The company, a prominent data and AI firm listed on NASDAQ under the symbol EXLS, shared this news.
news.headline: EXL to be at investor conferences; execs to attend. CFO Nicolelli and Investor Relations head Kristoff to participate.

news.summary: IonQ's first-quarter loss was reduced compared to the previous year, aligning with expectations. The company's revenue guidance for the June quarter was consistent with predictions. IonQ's recent acquisitions focus on communications and space, reflecting the growing interest in quantum computing stocks.
news.headline: IonQ sees smaller Q1 loss from last year. Revenue guidance for June quarter aligns with views, targets comms and space.

news.summary: The CEO of Instacart, Fidji Simo, will be departing from the company to take on the role of leading application development at OpenAI. This move has caused Instacart's stock to drop. The news article titled "OpenAI Hires Instacart Chief Executive To Lead Applications" was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Instacart CEO Fidji Simo joins OpenAI for app development; Instacart stock drops in response.

news.summary: The stock of Warner Bros. experienced a slight decline following mixed results, as compared to Disney which surpassed expectations. Meanwhile, Dow Jones, a major player in the industry, announced plans to launch a new resort in the United Arab Emirates. Warner Bros. attracted more subscribers than Disney, but their shares slid in light of the results. The information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Warner Bros. outpaces Disney in subscribers, stock slide. Disney meets estimates, plans new UAE resort. Warner shares lower.

news.summary: As a result of technological advancements, humanoid robots are being introduced to address the shortage of workers in monotonous and physically demanding roles. These robots could potentially help alleviate labor shortages and even provide care for seniors in need. This development showcases the increasing integration of robotics into various industries to combat the challenges posed by a lack of human workers.
news.headline: Humanoid robots may fill labor shortages, perform dull tasks, and care for seniors, as technology advances.

news.summary: In Q1, D-Wave announced a loss that was lower than anticipated, with revenue exceeding expectations. This positive performance has drawn attention from investors, who are closely watching the potential growth of quantum computing stocks. The company's earnings report has sparked interest in the market, with a focus on the future outlook for the industry.
news.headline: D-Wave beats Q1 loss estimates, surpasses revenue expectations, boosting quantum computing stock outlook.

news.summary: A company known for manufacturing Tasers is preparing to introduce a new type of dart capable of piercing clothing. Production for this new dart is set to begin next year. Despite challenges related to DOGE and tariffs, the company, Axon, has seen positive financial results, as indicated by a recent earnings report. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Axon's earnings rise despite challenges, plans new Taser dart. Stay strong amidst DOGE, tariffs.
Uber stock downgraded by Wedbush analysts due to "lack of catalysts" post Q1. Mixed results prompt dip.

news.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE: FICO) from Bozeman, Montana, plans to conduct a private offering of $1.5 billion in aggregate principal amount of Senior Notes due 2033. The offering is exempt from registration under the Securities Act of 1933. These Notes will be senior unsecured obligations of FICO. The company intends to utilize the net proceeds from this offering for the repayment of certain obligations.
news.headline: FICO Announces Proposed Offering of $1.5 Billion in Senior Notes
